zh.lifeSummary: 當John Yelverton於大約1416年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可拉可亞斯時，他的父親Sir William Yelverton of Rougham18歲，母親Joan Le Gross27歲。他和Margery Morley至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1481年7月9日在英國英格蘭諾福爾可諾維其享年66歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可諾維其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Yelverton于大约1416年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可拉可亞斯时，他的父亲Sir William Yelverton of Rougham18岁，母亲Joan Le Gross27岁。他和Margery Morley至少有2个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1481年7月9日在英国英格兰諾福爾可諾維其享年66岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可諾維其。

nameMeanings.name: Yelverton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Devon): habitational name from either of two places called Yelverton, in Norfolk or Devon. Medieval examples of the surname are from the Norfolk place, but the modern surname in Britain is associated mainly with Devon, where the earliest record of the surname is found in 1761, and is probably a substitution for Elford , an earlier form of the Devon placename. The Devon place, a hamlet in Buckland Monachorum, is not officially on record as Yelverton until the 19th century, when the Great Western Railway so named the station it built there in 1859. It is a dialect pronunciation of Elverton, which is first recorded in 1765 as an extended form of its medieval name Elford + -ton ‘town’. The Norfolk placename is recorded as Ailuertuna in 1086, and probably derives from the Old English personal name Æthelfrith or Geldfrith + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Elford
meanings: English: habitational name from Yelverton in Buckland Monachorum (Devon), recorded as Elleford in 1291 (see Yelverton ), named from the Old English personal name Ella or elle, ellen ‘elder tree’ + ford ‘ford’. The name may also derive from any of the places called Elford in Staffordshire and Northumberland, both probably from the Old English personal name Ella + ford.

variants.name: Yelvington
meanings: Probably an altered form of English   Yelverton  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Yelverton was born about 1416, in Rackheath, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir William Yelverton of Rougham, was 18 and his mother, Joan Le Gross, was 27. He had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Margery Morley. He died on 9 July 1481, in Norwich, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 66, and was buried in Norwich, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Yelverton est né environ 1416, à Rackheath, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William Yelverton of Rougham, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Joan Le Gross, avait 27 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Margery Morley. Il est décédé le 9 juillet 1481, à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Yelverton um 1416 in Rackheath, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Yelverton of Rougham 18 und seine Mutter Joan Le Gross 27. Er hatte mit Margery Morley mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 9. Juli 1481 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Norwich, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Norwich, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Yelverton è nato il circa 1416 nel Rackheath, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir William Yelverton of Rougham, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Joan Le Gross, aveva 27 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Margery Morley. Morì il 9 luglio 1481, nel Norwich, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Norwich, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Yelvertonが約1416年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクラックヒースで生まれた時，父Sir William Yelverton of Roughamは18歳，母Joan Le Grossは27歳であった。彼はMargery Morleyとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1481年7月9日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクノーウィチで66歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクノーウィチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Yelverton(이)가 대략 1416년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 라크히스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Yelverton of Rougham(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Le Gross(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Margery Morley(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1481년 7월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 노위치에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 노위치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Yelverton nasceu aproximadamente 1416, em Rackheath, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William Yelverton of Rougham, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Joan Le Gross, tinha 27 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com Margery Morley. Ele faleceu em 9 de julho de 1481, em Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Yelverton родился около 1416 г. в местности раккхит, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir William Yelverton of Rougham было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Le Gross, 27. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Margery Morley. Он умер 9 июля 1481 г. в местности норвич, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности норвич, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Yelverton nació aproximadamente 1416, en Rackheath, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir William Yelverton of Rougham, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Joan Le Gross, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas con Margery Morley. Murió el 9 de julio de 1481, en Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
